title: No Redstone Sounds
description: Silences most redstone-related block sounds for a cleaner and quieter Minecraft experience, except "switch-type blocks” like levers and buttons.
body:
#  I searched for a pack that mutes all redstone related blocks in the same pack exept a few useful exceptions but didn't find any, so I made my own !
# 
## **Not affected blocks:**

 - Note Blocks 
   
 - Trapdoors
   
 - Doors 
   
 - Levers
   
- Buttons
   
 - Pressure Plates
  
## **Affected blocks:**

- Pistons
  
 - Sticky Pistons
   
 - Dispensers
   
 - Droppers
   
- Observers
   
 - Redstone Repeaters
   
- Redstone Comparators
   
 - Tripwires
   
 - Crafters
